hero.headline: When Your Heat *Quits at Midnight*, We Answer
hero.subheadline: Lancaster HVAC team that shows up fast and gets it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every System, Every Season
services_section.subheading: From ancient units to brand-new installs

services.title: Heating Repair & Service
services.description: Keep your furnace running when Lancaster winters hit hard. We service everything from older units to modern systems.

services.title: Air Conditioning Install
services.description: Central air, mini splits, and full system replacements. Quick installation that gets you cool fast.

services.title: Emergency HVAC
services.description: No heat in winter, no AC in summer. We respond fast when your system fails at the worst time.

services.title: Maintenance Programs
services.description: Twice-yearly checkups, filter changes, and tune-ups that catch problems before they become expensive.

about.heading: Lancaster HVAC Since Day One
about.body: We're the Lancaster team that answers the phone and shows up when we say we will. Real people, real trucks, honest answers.

reviews.name: Pajfuab M.
reviews.text: Wonderful experience! They've serviced our very old HVAC unit twice now. Instead of pushing us to replace it for $14,000, Rich was understanding and suggested we keep it running.

reviews.name: Nicole H.
reviews.text: Lost heat AND hot water mid-day on a cold winter day. Amazing customer service from the moment I called - fast response, quick and efficient problem solving.

reviews.name: R F.
reviews.text: Great local company. Rob and Bruce gave me fair pricing and good options for my AC replacement. Quick installation, new system runs great.

cta.heading: Ready to Get Your System Running Right?
cta.body: Free quotes on all HVAC work. Same honest pricing, no surprises.
